channel.title: Java on Chasing's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Java on Chasing's blog

item.title: LeetCode
item.description: ID Status Problem Difficulty Frequency 1 ✅ 206.reverse-linked-list Easy 496 2 ✅ 3.longest-substring-without-repeating-characters Medium 455 3 ✅ 146.lru-cache Medium 401 4 ✅ 215.kth-largest-element-in-an-array Medium 333 5 ✅ 25.reverse-nodes-in-k-group Hard 254 6 ✅ 15.3sum Medium 237 7 ✅ 53.maximum-subarray Easy 212 8 ✅ 21.merge-two-sorted-lists Easy 204 9 ✅ 1.two-sum Easy 196 10 ✅ 102.binary-tree-level-order-traversal Medium 189 11 ✅ 121.best-time-to-buy-and-sell-stock Easy 175 12 ✅ 20.valid-parentheses Easy 174 13 ✅ 141.linked-list-cycle Easy 174 14 ✅ 103.

item.title: Concurrency Programming
item.description: 1. Implements 1 2 3 4 5 graph TD; A-->B; A-->C; B-->D; C-->D; volatile：声明后所有线程看到的改变量的值是一样的。写操作时，会添加Lock前缀的汇编。 保证了1. 保证缓存行
